nasb.text: When Aaron trims the lamps at twilight, he shall burn incense. There shall be perpetual incense before the Lord throughout your generations.

esv.text: and when Aaron sets up the lamps at twilight, he shall burn it, a regular incense offering before the Lord throughout your generations.

cnv.text: 傍晚，亞倫點燈的時候，也要燒這香，在耶和華面前作你們世世代代不斷的香。

ccb.text: 黄昏点灯的时候，他也要在耶和华面前烧香，世世代代都要如此。
